acceptance_criteria: .gitignore file created with correct patterns for Gradle, IDEA, Eclipse, Fabric Loom, and Stonecutter
Git repository initialized successfully
Initial commit created with message 'chore: init repo + gitignore'
Gradle wrapper installed with version 8.10+
settings.gradle.kts configured with Stonecutter plugin and 1.21.4 as active version
build.gradle.kts configured with Fabric Loom, Java 21, and JUnit 5 dependencies
gradle.properties contains modId, modGroup, modVersion properties
Build system resolves without errors: ./gradlew :1.21.4:dependencies succeeds

agents.task_title: Task 3: fabric.mod.json + Mod Main Class Stub
acceptance_criteria: fabric.mod.json created with schema version 1, correct entrypoint, and depends section
DndWeaponsMod.java implements ModInitializer with MOD_ID constant and LOGGER
Mod builds successfully: ./gradlew :1.21.4:build produces JAR
Mod loads in client: ./gradlew :1.21.4:runClient shows initialization log message
Category.java enum has exactly 4 constants: SIMPLE_MELEE, SIMPLE_RANGED, MARTIAL_MELEE, MARTIAL_RANGED
DamageType.java enum has exactly 3 constants: SLASHING, PIERCING, BLUDGEONING
Property.java enum has exactly 10 constants: LIGHT, HEAVY, FINESSE, REACH, TWO_HANDED, VERSATILE, THROWN, AMMUNITION, LOADING, SPECIAL_LANCE
RangeKind.java enum has exactly 7 constants: NONE, THROWN, BOW, CROSSBOW, FIREARM, SLING, BLOWGUN
All enums compile successfully: ./gradlew :1.21.4:compileJava succeeds
longsword.json is valid JSON with type 'minecraft:crafting_shaped'
Recipe pattern is 3x1 (I, I, S vertically)
Key defines I as c:ingots/iron and S as c:rods/wooden
Result specifies dndweapons:longsword with count 1
Recipe compiles into JAR successfully

agents.task_title: Task 11: Localization + Item Model + Placeholder Texture
acceptance_criteria: en_us.json contains entries for 'itemGroup.dndweapons.main' and 'item.dndweapons.longsword'
longsword.json item model is valid JSON parented to minecraft:item/generated with layer0 texture
longsword.png placeholder texture is copied from vanilla iron_sword.png or equivalent
All asset files compile into JAR with correct paths
versions/1.21.4/gradle.properties created with minecraft_version, yarn_mappings, loader_version, fabric_version
Minecraft version is 1.21.4, Yarn is 1.21.4+build.8, Loader is 0.16.10, Fabric API is 0.115.0+1.21.4
Stonecutter materializes the subproject: ./gradlew 'Set active project' -PccVersion=1.21.4 succeeds
Dependency tree resolves: ./gradlew :1.21.4:dependencies succeeds

WeaponSpec is a Java record with 15 parameters including id, displayName, category, damageType, diceText, versatileDice, attackDamage, versatileBonus, attackSpeed, reachBonus, knockbackBonus, properties, ranged, baseDurability, vanillaRoleTag
WeaponSpec validates non-blank id and displayName in constructor
WeaponSpec properties are defensively copied to immutable Set
isVanillaMapped() returns true when vanillaRoleTag is non-null
WeaponSpecTest has 4 passing tests covering construction, validation, vanilla mapping
DndWeaponItem extends Item and stores a WeaponSpec reference
Constructor takes WeaponSpec and Item.Settings, calls super(settings)
spec() getter returns the stored WeaponSpec
Class compiles successfully with no errors
Weapons class is final with private constructor (utility class pattern)
Weapons.LONGSWORD is a static final WeaponSpec with correct specs (1d8/1d10, attackDamage=6, versatileBonus=1, attackSpeed=1.5, VERSATILE property, Category.MARTIAL_MELEE, DamageType.SLASHING)
Weapons.ALL is a static List containing only LONGSWORD in Phase 1
WeaponsTest has 3 passing tests: allIsNonEmpty, allIdsAreUnique, longswordIsPresentAndCorrect
WeaponRegistrar interface has register(WeaponSpec) method and default registerAll(List<WeaponSpec>)
WeaponRegistrarImpl.register() skips vanilla-mapped specs silently
WeaponRegistrarImpl creates Identifier for non-vanilla specs with format 'dndweapons:{spec.id()}'
WeaponRegistrarImpl builds AttributeModifiersComponent with ATTACK_DAMAGE (setting - 1) and ATTACK_SPEED (setting - 4) modifiers
WeaponRegistrarImpl registers DndWeaponItem via Registry.register(Registries.ITEM, itemId, item)
Logging output shows registered weapons with format 'Registered weapon: {itemId}'

agents.task_title: Task 9: Wire Registration in Mod Init + Creative Tab
acceptance_criteria: DndWeaponsMod.onInitialize() creates WeaponRegistrarImpl and calls registrar.registerAll(Weapons.ALL)
CREATIVE_TAB is a RegistryKey<ItemGroup> keyed to 'dndweapons:main'
ItemGroup is registered with displayName translatable key 'itemGroup.dndweapons.main' and icon from Longsword
ItemGroupEvents.modifyEntriesEvent(CREATIVE_TAB) adds all non-vanilla-mapped specs to creative inventory
Build succeeds: ./gradlew :1.21.4:build produces JAR
Client test passes: Longsword appears in creative inventory with correct tooltip (6 Attack Damage, 1.5 Attack Speed)
Tooltip damage calculation is verified (vanilla sword does 6 damage minimum)
fabric.mod.json 'entrypoints' object contains both 'main' and 'fabric-gametest' entries
fabric-gametest entrypoint points to 'com.dndweapons.test.RegistrationGametest'
RegistrationGametest implements FabricGameTest with longswordIsRegistered(TestContext) method
GameTest annotation uses template 'fabric-gametest-api-v1:empty'
Test verifies Identifier.of(MOD_ID, 'longsword') resolves to non-AIR item
Test calls ctx.complete() on success
Gametest passes: ./gradlew :1.21.4:runGametest reports PASSED
Gametest report file is generated at build/gametest-report.xml
